description_long: This is a rustic wooden picnic table with a rectangular tabletop and two long benches attached on either side. The table and benches are constructed from wide, weathered wooden planks, giving it a sturdy and robust appearance suitable for outdoor use. The support structure consists of angled wooden braces and crossbeams, providing stability and strength. The wood grain and texture are clearly visible, with a dark, aged finish that suggests exposure to the elements. The benches are seamlessly integrated into the table's frame, making it a single, unified piece of furniture. There are no visible decorative elements, and the design is purely functional, emphasizing durability and practicality.
description: A weathered wooden picnic table with attached benches, featuring a robust, rustic design and visible wood grain. The structure is sturdy and built for outdoor environments.
description_view_0: Front view showing the tabletop and one attached bench, with visible support beams underneath.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the benches and tabletop, as well as the angled support braces.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, showing the opposite bench and support structure.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, displaying the full length of the benches and tabletop.
